titleStmt.title: SII 26.142: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 142. (A.R. No. 134 of 1909.) KOMARALIṄGAM, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple.

This inscription records a gift of paddy for food offerings to the god Kariyapirāṉ of Kumaraṅgaviyamach-charuppēdimaṅgalam in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu by Vīrandaḻiyaṉ alias Udaiyādichchadēvaṉ who is also stated to have purchased from Aḻagapperumān of Śōḻamādēvi of Karaivaḻi-nāḍu some land described as Kariyapirāṉ kuḍinīṅgāt-tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yā
ṇṭu 2 10 7vatu virantaḻiyaṉāna Utaiyā
ticca tevanen karaivaḻiṉāṭṭu kumaraṅka
viyamac caruppetimaṅkalattu kariyapirāṉu
kku Amutupaṭiyāka tānam paṇṇiṉa nāḷon
ṟukku Arici nāḻi Uḻakkukku Onṟu munṟu nel mu
ṉṉāḻi muvuḻakkāka Ivvāṭṭai Aiyppicai māta
m mutal Amutu ceytaruḷi Ippiracātattil nampiyā
ṟku Uḻakku nikki nāḻiyum Eṅkaḷ kāṇippaṭi
yāka Aḻippeṉākavum Ippaṭi ceyyum yiṉāṭṭu
coḻamāteviyil viyāpāri koṭṭu nāna Aḻakappe
rumān pakkal nān vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya kariyapirān kuṭi nīṅkātti
ruviṭaiyāṭṭam ttaṉpakkal vitai Irukalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi
yum ca vai vitai Irutūṇikkuṟuṇiyum Āka nel vitai muk
kalattile Ivvaḻinaṭaikku pūnāḻinān Eṭutti koyilile cipa
ṇṭārakkālāl Aḷakka kaṭava nel Eḻu kalaṉe kuṟuṇināṉāḻi
uriyum Ikkārmutal Ivaḻinaṭait taṉmam cantrādittavaṟ
celvatāka kalveṭṭikkuṭutten Utaiyāticcatevanen
Ittanmam patiṉeṭṭu maṇṭalattu śrī
Digital edition of SII 26.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
